rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Registry Key Added: LanmanServer Parameters

rules.rule_text:
title: 'Suspicious Registry Key Added: LanmanServer Parameters'
id: 9c5df39b-0fe2-450b-bc90-a1b748dca8af
status: experimental
description: Detects registry addition for LanmanServer MaxMpxCt. BlackCat does this
  to increase the number of outstanding requests allowed, such as SMB requests to
  distribute ransomware through an environment.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/04
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1105
- attack.t1562
logsource:
  category: registry_add
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    EventType: CreateKey
    TargetObject: SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanServer\Parameters
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
